body_preview:
The business has no income, my business partner in Germany Marc Emmanuel
Otto, has cancer and is just spending his own money, because he cant take
it with him.

On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:02 AM Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
wrote:

> Hello,
>
>
>
> I understand getting 3 part verification for income is difficult when it
> is your own/co-owned business. I am going to attach a new income from a
> business form and on there is where you can list the income you receive
> from the business monthly.
>
>
>
> *Ashley Glass *
>
> Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
>
> 503-802-8315
>
> [image: Logo Description automatically generated]
>
>
>
> If you need to report any household or income changes, you can download
> documents from the participant portal at
>
> https://portal.homeforward.org/Forms/Participant
>
>
>
> You can pick up forms or drop off packets at our customer service window.
>
> The customer service window is open Tuesday – Thursday from 9:00AM – noon
> and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street
>
>
>
> *From:* benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> *Sent:* Wednesday, April 1, 2026 9:58 AM
> *To:* Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
> *Subject:* Fwd: Additional Information Needed
>
>
>
> You don't often get email from starworks5@gmail.com. Learn why this is
> important <https://aka.ms/LearnAboutSenderIdentification>
>
> 🛑  CAUTION: This email is NOT from a Home Forward email address. Do NOT
> click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know
> the content is safe. *Home Forward does NOT have a "Safe Sender" list.* :CAUTION
> 🛑
>
>
>
> ---------- Forwarded message ---------
> From: *benjamin barber* <starworks5@gmail.com>
> Date: Mon, Feb 9, 2026 at 10:40 AM
> Subject: Re: Additional Information Needed
> To: Tilton, Kati <KTilton@clackamas.us>
>
>
>
> I have no idea what the process is like to get it "verified, complete,
> accepted by the IRS".
>
> So when you say "accepted" do you mean you want the priority mail tracking
> number, or do you want a LITERAL IRS officer to certify it? The estimated
> wait time to get to see an IRS employee at the Taxpayer Assistance Center
> to get such a certification is 30-60 days, which would certainly put us
> past the time that we're supposed to vacate the residence. This seems to be
> opposite of the guidance that I was presented by your office less than a
> year ago with Ariana Stalcup, that contains the actual income verification
> requirements. It's also amusing quite frankly, because not once have I ever
> seen your office demand Julio Cortez ever produce an IRS 1040, much less
> have some sort of acceptance letter from the IRS, given that he claims he
> is going to be in the blossom are you also requiring him to turn in a form
> 1040?
>
>
> ======
>
> ======
>
> ======
>
>
>
